chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI Protective Bail Appln. No. 2551 of 2025. _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of judge 1.For orders on M.A No. 13675/2025. 2.For orders on office objection a/w reply at Flag A. 3.For orders on M.A No. 13676/2025. 3.For hearing of bail application. 26.09.2025. Mr. Raj Ali Wahid Kunwar, advocate a/w applicant. ======= 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. By this application, applicant Fahad Kamr seeks protective bail in Crime No.163 of 2025 of P.S Soljar Bazar, Karachi registered U/Ss 397, 324, 34 PPC r/w Section 3, 4, &5 of Lawyers Welfare and Protection Act 2023. Mr. Raj Ali Wahid Kunwar, advocate for the applicant contends that a Guardian and Wards case is pending adjudication before 19th Family Judge, Karachi South with applicant’s wife namely Mst. Razia Noor Ali however, the colleague of the counsel for his wife namely Mr.Naseeruddin, Advocate has also lodged FIR with malafide intentions and ulterior motives. He submits that police has shaken hands with complainant party and it is made difficult for applicant to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such he has appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, applicant is granted protective bail for 15 days subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/= and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 15 working days from today or the date on which the applicant will surrender before the trial Court, whichever is earlier.

Without touching merits of the case, applicant is granted protective bail for 15 days subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/= and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 15 working days from today or the date on which the applicant will surrender before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of. JUDGE Shabir/P.S
